## Componente afetado

- [ ] Schema SQL (`backend/schema/`)
- [ ] Seeds (`backend/seed/`)
- [ ] Export Python (`backend/export/`)
- [ ] Docker / Makefile
- [ ] Landing (`web/index.html`)
- [ ] Docs OpenAPI (`web/docs.html`, `web/openapi.yaml`)
- [ ] Outro:
